messages.text: The organist unseals a rank of rib-pipes at your chest and looses a moaning chord of trapped, spore-choked breath that rolls over you like a tide. The blow {verb} you!
The organist hauls open a bank of hollowed femurs and the moaning chord booms past you as you throw yourself flat between the pipe-ranks.
The organist finds the sub-audible pipes and the chord drops below hearing, and the pressure crushes in on you from every side at once as the rot pours down your throat! The blow {verb} you!
